text.title: US / UK / EU Compliance Matrix Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: tag-customers-by-jurisdiction
step.action: Backfill jurisdiction tag per customer. Block new records without tag.

step.name: enumerate-data-activities
step.action: List every processing activity. Assign lawful basis per activity.

step.name: pick-contract-templates
step.action: Per buyer type, pick template (DPA + SCC / IDTA / consumer). Store paths in matrix.

step.name: track-tax-thresholds
step.action: Build tax-status table. Alert at 80% threshold.

step.name: tag-ai-features
step.action: Tag each with AI Act risk level. For high-risk, schedule conformity assessment.

step.name: counsel-signoff
step.action: Send to counsel; collect signed sign-off; file in compliance repo.
step.note: Gate: If counsel rejects, STOP — fix gaps before publishing.
